description: Legal document in the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe (1100–38). Mentions a ketubba and Abū l-ʿAlāʾ. Refers to the tearing up of the ketubba and the cancellation of the obligations in it. In the margin of verso refers to 'the old document.' (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
